name: Bread and Butter Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cucumbers.
2. Cut them into thin slices.
3. Peel and slice the onions.
4. Combine the sliced onions and cucumbers.
5. Add salt to the mixture.
6. Let it stand for 2 hours.
7. Drain the mixture.
8. Heat the vinegar, water, celery seed, mustard seed, sugar, ginger, and turmeric in a pot until boiling.
9. Add the cucumbers and onions to the hot mixture.
10. Continue boiling slowly until they become tender.
11. Pack the pickles hot into freshly sterilized jars.
